summary: Iter10 RETEST of the 3 fixes from iter9. All three fixes verified: (1) NotificationsBell now mounted in authenticated Layout with data-testid='nav-bell' and renders correctly on /app, /app/statements, /app/chat, /settings/profile; dropdown opens; unread badge (count=1) visible; mark-all-read clears it. (2) POST /api/household/invite now returns 402 plan_required for Solo & Free users BEFORE the household check (plan gate first). (3) Cmd+K CommandDialog opens with no Radix DialogTitle/aria-describedby a11y warnings. Backend 8/8, Frontend 100%.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~1802 lines — previously flagged; still recommend splitting into routers (digest/notifications/billing/household/auth).
NotificationsBell polling improvement shipped (pause on document.hidden) — good.
tone='light' vs 'dark' approach is clean and avoids prop-drilling CSS — OK.
test_credentials: cathy@example.com / testpass123 (family plan). Throwaway Solo/Free signups for invite plan-gate verification.
seed_data_creation: Triggered one POST /api/digest/send during retest (creates a weekly_digest notification + marks it read). Marked notifications as read via API and UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter9 issues closed. Bell present on every authenticated route tested; mark-all-read works; invite plan-gate now 402 for Solo/Free before 400 household-check; CommandDialog has sr-only DialogTitle+DialogDescription so Radix console warnings are gone. No regressions seen on cathy login, auth/me, digest/preview, digest/send, notifications/list, notifications/read.
